title: The Cherokee physician, or, Indian guide to health : comprising a brief view of anatomy, with general rules for preserving health without the use of medicines : the diseases of the United States, with their symptoms, causes, and means of prevention are explained in simple terms : it also contains a description of a variety of herbs and roots, many of which are not explained in any other book, the medicinal virtues of which have hitherto been unknown to the whites / as given by Richard Foreman ; to which is added a short dispensatory by Jas. W. Mahoney.
